log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Eladrin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Eladrin — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Eladrin — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Eladrin — Iron Concentration HP: 47/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Eladrin — Iron Concentration HP: 31/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Eladrin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 31/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Eladrin — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Eladrin — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Eladrin — Iron Concentration HP: 14/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Eladrin — Iron Concentration HP: 1/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 38 damage. Eladrin — Iron Concentration HP: -37/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Eladrin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Eladrin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
